transmutation.name: Orb of Transmutation
transmutation.effect: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic with one affix. Always step 1.

augmentation.name: Orb of Augmentation
augmentation.effect: Adds a second affix to a Magic item (opposite side).

regal.name: Regal Orb
regal.effect: Upgrades a Magic item to Rare, adding one affix. Pair with Coronation omens or essences to remove the gamble.

alchemy.name: Orb of Alchemy
alchemy.effect: Upgrades a Normal item directly to Rare (~4 affixes). Mostly for Waystones.

exalted.name: Exalted Orb
exalted.effect: Adds one random affix to a Rare item with an open slot. The finishing orb; Greater for routine, Perfect when the slam matters.

chaos.name: Chaos Orb
chaos.effect: Removes one random affix and adds one new affix on a Rare. Pair with Whittling/Erasure omens to target.

annulment.name: Orb of Annulment
annulment.effect: Removes one random affix. Pair with Sinistral/Dextral Annulment to target a side.

divine.name: Divine Orb
divine.effect: Re-rolls the numeric values of all affixes within their tier ranges (not the affixes themselves). Final polish only.

fracturing.name: Fracturing Orb
fracturing.effect: Permanently locks one RANDOM affix on a Rare with 4+ mods (immune to Chaos/Annul/Divine/Vaal). 9+ divines; high-end only.

vaal.name: Vaal Orb
vaal.effect: Corrupts an item (random outcome; in 0.5 mod-change multiplies values). Irreversible, always the final step.

essences.note: Essences guarantee one specific modifier and upgrade Magic→Rare. In 0.5 an item can carry at most ONE essence/alloy modifier. A Perfect Essence works on a Rare: it removes a random mod, then adds its guaranteed mod (pair with Crystallisation omens for side control).

examples.body: Essence of the Body — Maximum Life.
examples.abrasion: Essence of Abrasion — flat Physical Damage (weapons).
examples.flames_ice_electricity: Essence of Flames/Ice/Electricity — flat elemental damage (weapons).
examples.sorcery: Perfect Essence of Sorcery — spell damage / +to spell levels.
examples.battle: Perfect Essence of Battle — +levels to all attack skills (+3 on 2H/Crossbow, +2 on 1H/Bow in 0.5). Key for martial weapons.
examples.ruin: Essence of Ruin — Chaos Resistance (cheap chaos-res fix).

alloys.note: Runic Alloys (0.5, ~13 types) replace one existing mod with a guaranteed mod from an otherwise-uncraftable pool (Imbued=ailment, Expansive=area, Mystic=caster, Swift=speed). Like Perfect Essences they remove a random mod — fill the opposite slot type first so the removal can't hit a keeper.

sinistral_exaltation.name: Omen of Sinistral Exaltation
sinistral_exaltation.effect: Next Exalted Orb adds a PREFIX only.

dextral_exaltation.name: Omen of Dextral Exaltation
dextral_exaltation.effect: Next Exalted Orb adds a SUFFIX only.

greater_exaltation.name: Omen of Greater Exaltation
greater_exaltation.effect: Next Exalted Orb adds TWO mods.

catalysing_exaltation.name: Omen of Catalysing Exaltation
catalysing_exaltation.effect: Next Exalted Orb (jewellery) is biased toward mods sharing a tag with the applied catalyst quality (~5x weight at 20% quality, ~7.5x at 40%). The in-league tag-bias tool.

sinistral_annulment.name: Omen of Sinistral Annulment
sinistral_annulment.effect: Next Orb of Annulment removes a PREFIX only.

dextral_annulment.name: Omen of Dextral Annulment
dextral_annulment.effect: Next Orb of Annulment removes a SUFFIX only.

greater_annulment.name: Omen of Greater Annulment
greater_annulment.effect: Next Orb of Annulment removes TWO mods.

sinistral_crystallisation.name: Omen of Sinistral Crystallisation
sinistral_crystallisation.effect: Next Perfect/Corrupted Essence removes its random mod from the PREFIX side.

dextral_crystallisation.name: Omen of Dextral Crystallisation
dextral_crystallisation.effect: Next Perfect/Corrupted Essence removes its random mod from the SUFFIX side.

sinistral_coronation.name: Omen of Sinistral Coronation
sinistral_coronation.effect: Next Regal Orb adds a PREFIX only.

dextral_coronation.name: Omen of Dextral Coronation
dextral_coronation.effect: Next Regal Orb adds a SUFFIX only.

whittling.name: Omen of Whittling
whittling.effect: Next Chaos Orb removes the mod with the LOWEST item-level requirement (NOT lowest tier — hover to confirm). Expensive cleanup tool.

sinistral_necromancy.name: Omen of Sinistral Necromancy
sinistral_necromancy.effect: Next desecration (Abyssal Bone) adds a PREFIX-side Desecrated mod only.

dextral_necromancy.name: Omen of Dextral Necromancy
dextral_necromancy.effect: Next desecration adds a SUFFIX-side Desecrated mod only.

abyssal_echoes.name: Omen of Abyssal Echoes
abyssal_echoes.effect: At the Well of Souls, the three offered Desecrated mods can be rerolled once (effectively 6 options).

light.name: Omen of Light
light.effect: Next Orb of Annulment removes ONLY the Desecrated modifier (retry a failed desecrate).

Staff: Gain % of Damage as Extra Damage

techniques.name: Isolation (fracture + side annul)
techniques.when: deterministically delete one specific unwanted mod
techniques.how: Fracture a GOOD mod on the same side as the unwanted one, activate Sinistral/Dextral Annulment for that side, then Annul — the only legal target left is the bad mod.

techniques.name: Desecrate loop
techniques.how: Open a slot on the desired side, activate Sinistral/Dextral Necromancy + the Lich omen + Abyssal Echoes, apply a Preserved/Ancient Bone, reveal at the Well of Souls; on a miss use Omen of Light + Annul and retry.

techniques.name: Perfect Essence + Crystallisation
techniques.when: upgrade one filler mod into a specific guaranteed mod
techniques.how: Fill the side you DON'T want removed, pick the Crystallisation omen for the removable side, then apply the Perfect Essence — it removes one mod from the chosen side and adds its guaranteed mod.

techniques.name: Catalyst bias (jewellery)
techniques.when: tilt a jewellery slam toward a tag (the in-league replacement for Homogenising)
techniques.how: Apply 5-10 catalysts of the target tag (Flesh=life, Tul's=cold, ...), activate Omen of Catalysing Exaltation, then Greater Exalt. Breach Rings reach 50% quality for a stronger tilt.

techniques.name: Whittling cleanup
techniques.when: remove one low-ilvl filler mod from an otherwise finished item
techniques.how: Activate Omen of Whittling, hover the Chaos Orb to confirm it targets the lowest item-level mod (NOT necessarily lowest tier), then Chaos.

techniques.name: Sandbox first
techniques.when: before spending real currency on any non-trivial craft
techniques.how: Model the exact omen/currency sequence on craftofexile.com (PoE2 mode) and compare expected cost to the item's value.

workflowOrder: Acquire a base at the right item level (check PoE2DB for the highest T1 ilvl gate you need)
Essence to Rare, guaranteeing a key mod (tag-aware on jewellery)
Establish a tag anchor on jewellery (for the catalyst step)
Exalt slams to fill open slots (Sinistral/Dextral to pick the side)
Desecrate for an exclusive Lich mod if the build wants one
Clean up the weak mod with side-targeted Annul / Whittling
Add sockets and runes / soul cores
